title: Local Government : Subsidiary Legislation : Kweneng District Council (control of Livestock and Other Animals) Bye-laws
title_en: Local Government : Subsidiary Legislation : Kweneng District Council (control of Livestock and Other Animals) Bye-laws

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content:
1. Citation
These Bye-Laws may be cited as the Kweneng District Council (Control of Livestock and Other Animals) Bye-laws.
